title: Back Weapon Slot MI
description: Adds Back Weapon Slot Compatibility to Truly Modular: Items API
body:
# Back Weapon Slot MI Compat

This mod adds a small compability for 
- [Truly Modular Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-arsenal)
- [Truly Modular Archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-archery)
